UserStory: As a farmer, I want to create and update my profile so that buyers can evaluate my farm details
AcceptanceCriteria: Farmer can save region, crops, bio, UPI, and bank details through protected API

UserStory: As a buyer, I want to register with crop preferences and optional card details so that onboarding is faster
AcceptanceCriteria: Buyer register supports desired crops; optional card data is saved in masked format

UserStory: As a buyer, I want to save a payment card from dashboard so that repeat checkout becomes easier
AcceptanceCriteria: Card validation is enforced; stored card exposes brand, last4, and expiry only

UserStory: As a buyer, I want to browse farmer profiles so that I can identify suitable partners
AcceptanceCriteria: Buyer can load farmer cards with region, crops, and bio; text filter narrows results

UserStory: As a farmer, I want to browse buyer profiles so that I can find demand for my crops
AcceptanceCriteria: Farmer can load buyer cards with desired crops; text filter works across card fields

UserStory: As a logged-in user, I want clear visual action cards on home so that navigation is faster
AcceptanceCriteria: Role-based cards open expected pages like profile, search, and dashboard

UserStory: As a logged-in user, I want top navigation and profile menu actions so that I can move between core pages
AcceptanceCriteria: Topbar links work; logout clears session and redirects to /login

UserStory: As a farmer, I want setup guidance when redirected after registration so that I finish profile completion
As a user, I want a responsive and readable interface so that the app works on mobile and desktop
AcceptanceCriteria: Global layered background renders correctly; key layouts adapt at mobile breakpoints

UserStory: As QA, I want Sprint 2 test execution records so that release readiness is visible
AcceptanceCriteria: Sprint 2 test results CSV is generated with case-level status and notes
